Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JAMES KNOBELOCH'S Motion to Quash Service of Summons. Appearances: Martin Glickfeld, Esq. Law Offices of Martin Glickfeld (415) 441-7491, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Christopher B. Queally, Esq. of Condon & Forsyth LLP (310) 557-2030, specially appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to quash granted. No specific jurisdiction over defendant. No substantial, continuous, and systematic contacts in California to justify the exercise of general jurisdiction. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
